data.title: 国际服大师币 Expert Permit 更新
data.summary: [Expert Permit Shop Update Notice] You can get the Expert Permits added in the 11/8 update as Daily
data.body:
[Expert Permit Shop Update Notice]

You can get the Expert Permits added in the 11/8 update as Daily and Weekly Task Rewards or by using AP at Max Lv. 
Then trade Expert Permits for valuable growth currencies like Special Pick-Up students' Elephs in the shop!

#BlueArchive![RMabHQm2fB6VQ2BTd5MWlXhKpBa7uH2c.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/RMabHQm2fB6VQ2BTd5MWlXhKpBa7uH2c.jpg)
